description: Root query object representing a SPARQL SELECT query with Sparnatural-specific extensions for labels, types, and tree structure.

subType.description: Query form. Currently only 'SELECT' is supported.

distinct.description: When true, the DISTINCT keyword is added to the SELECT clause. null if not needed.

metadata.description: Optional metadata. Always null for generated queries.

variables.description: Ordered list of variables or aggregated expressions selected in the SELECT clause.

where.description: The main WHERE clause, structured as a BGP with a single shared subject.

solutionModifiers.description: Solution modifiers for ordering and limiting results.

LatLng.description: A geographic coordinate with latitude, longitude, and an optional altitude.

alt.description: Optional altitude in meters. null if not needed.

TermLabelledIri.description: An RDF named node (IRI) with a human-readable label.

TermLiteral.description: An RDF literal term. Can be a plain literal, a language-tagged literal, or a datatype literal.

value.description: The lexical value of the literal.

label.description: Optional human-readable label. null if not needed.

langOrIri.description: Language tag for language-tagged literals, or a TermIri for datatype IRIs. null for plain string literals.

TermVariable.description: An RDF variable term. The value is the variable name without the '?' prefix.

value.description: Variable name without '?' prefix. Typically follows ClassName_N pattern (e.g. Artwork_1, Museum_2).

TermTypedVariable.description: A variable term with an associated RDF type. Used for subjects and objects to preserve class information.

rdfType.description: The RDF class IRI associated with this variable.

GraphTerm.description: A term that can appear in an RDF graph: IRI, labelled IRI, or literal. Discriminated by subType ('namedNode' vs 'literal') and presence of 'label'.

Ordering.description: A single ordering definition within an ORDER BY clause.

descending.description: true for DESC ordering, false for ASC ordering.

DateFilter.description: A date range filter generating a SPARQL FILTER with >= and/or <= comparisons. At least one of start or stop should be non-null.

start.description: Start date in ISO 8601 format or just a year (e.g. '2023', '-0450'). null if no lower bound.

stop.description: End date in ISO 8601 format or just a year. null if no upper bound.

NumberFilter.description: A numeric range filter generating a SPARQL FILTER with >= and/or <= comparisons. At least one of min or max should be non-null.

min.description: Minimum value (inclusive). null if no lower bound.

max.description: Maximum value (inclusive). null if no upper bound.

search.description: The search string or regex pattern.

MapFilter.description: A geographic area filter defined by a polygon or rectangle on a map.

coordType.description: The shape type of the geographic selection area.

coordinates.description: Array of coordinate rings. Each ring is an array of LatLng points.

LabelledFilter.description: A filter with a human-readable label preserving the user's input for display purposes.

label.description: Human-readable label describing the filter criteria.

filter.description: The actual filter definition. One of: dateFilter, numberFilter, searchFilter, mapFilter.

ObjectCriteria.description: Holds the criteria selected by the user for a given object in a predicate-object pair.

variable.description: The object variable with its associated RDF type.

values.description: Selected values from List, Autocomplete, Boolean, or Tree widgets. null if none.

filters.description: Labelled filters from Date, Number, Search, or Map widgets. null if none.

predicateObjectPairs.description: Nested predicate-object pairs for child criteria. null if none.

PredicateObjectPair.description: A predicate-object pair in a BGP. Represents a single criterion line in Sparnatural.

predicate.description: The property IRI used as predicate in the triple pattern.

object.description: The object criteria containing the target variable and any selected values, filters, or nested pairs.

subType.description: 'optional' generates OPTIONAL { }. 'notExists' generates FILTER NOT EXISTS { }. null for mandatory pairs.

PatternBgpSameSubject.description: A Basic Graph Pattern where all triple patterns share the same subject. Main structural element of the WHERE clause.

subject.description: The shared subject variable with its RDF type.

predicateObjectPairs.description: Ordered list of predicate-object pairs attached to this subject.

ExpressionAggregate.description: An aggregate expression such as COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX, SAMPLE, or GROUP_CONCAT.

aggregation.description: Aggregation function name (lowercase): count, sum, avg, min, max, sample, group_concat.

distinct.description: Whether DISTINCT is applied inside the aggregate function.

expression.description: The variable(s) being aggregated. Currently limited to a single TermVariable.

separator.description: Separator string for GROUP_CONCAT. null for other aggregation types.

PatternBind.description: A BIND pattern that binds the result of an aggregate expression to a variable. Used in variables array for aggregated columns.

variable.description: The variable to which the aggregate result is bound.

expression.description: The aggregate expression (e.g. COUNT, SUM, GROUP_CONCAT).

SolutionModifiers.description: SPARQL solution modifiers for ordering results and setting limit/offset.

order.description: ORDER BY clause definition. null if no ordering.

limitOffset.description: LIMIT/OFFSET clause definition. null if no limit.

SolutionModifierOrder.description: Defines the ORDER BY clause with one or more ordering definitions.

orderDefs.description: List of ordering definitions, applied in sequence.

SolutionModifierLimitOffset.description: Defines the LIMIT clause for restricting the number of results returned.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.
